title: Codepliant Configuration
description: Configuration file for Codepliant — the compliance document generator.

$schema.description: Path or URL to the JSON Schema for this config file.

companyName.description: Your company or organization name, used in all generated documents.

contactEmail.description: Primary contact email for privacy and compliance inquiries.

jurisdiction.description: Primary legal jurisdiction (e.g. 'State of Delaware, United States').

outputDir.description: Directory where generated compliance documents are written.

excludeServices.description: Service names to exclude from scan results.

dpoName.description: Data Protection Officer name (required for GDPR compliance).

euRepresentative.description: EU representative name/contact (required for non-EU companies under GDPR).

dataRetentionDays.description: Default data retention period in days.

aiRiskLevel.description: AI risk classification level per the EU AI Act.

aiUsageDescription.description: Human-readable description of how AI is used in your product.

jurisdictions.description: List of compliance jurisdictions that apply to your product.

tollFreeNumber.description: Toll-free phone number for privacy inquiries (required by some US state laws).

securityEmail.description: Email address for security vulnerability reports.

bugBountyUrl.description: URL to your bug bounty or responsible disclosure program.

sectionOverrides.description: Override specific sections in generated documents with custom text.

plugins.description: List of plugin package names to load.

generateEmployeeNotice.description: When true, generate an internal Employee Privacy Notice (GDPR Art. 13/14) covering workplace monitoring, AI tools, and employee data rights.

webhookUrl.description: Webhook URL for compliance status notifications (supports Slack incoming webhooks).
